title: Our Lady of Snows
tagline: Our Lady of Snows — hill station of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Snows, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Church of Our Lady of Snow is a Roman Catholic Marian church in Kallikulam, Tirunelveli district,[Tuticorin diocese], Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: The Church of Our Lady of Snow is a Roman Catholic Marian church in Kallikulam, Tirunelveli district,[Tuticorin diocese], Tamil Nadu, India. It is one of the Catholic pilgrimage centres in India dedicated to the Blessed Virgin Mary. In Tamil 'Pani' means 'Snow' and 'Matha' means 'Mother'.

topPlaces.name: Kallikulam
topPlaces.description: South Kallikulam is a panchayat village located in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is famous for the Our Lady of Snow church located at the heart of the Terku (South) Kallikulam.

topPlaces.name: Kizhavaneri
topPlaces.description: Kizhavaneri is a small village located about 50 km away from Tirunelveli, south part of Tamil Nadu, India. It is an old village and the people living here are staying more than 500 years.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkuvalliyur
topPlaces.description: Vadakkuvalliyur is a Town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Anaikulam
topPlaces.description: Anaikulam village is located in Radhapuram Taluka of Tirunelveli district of South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated 20 km away from Radhapuram and 60 km away from district headquarter Tirunelveli.

topPlaces.name: Valliyur Subramanya Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Subramanya Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple situated at Valliyur in Tirunelveli of Tamil Nadu in the peninsular India. The sanctum of the temple is a rock-cut hill.

topPlaces.name: Nallankulam
topPlaces.description: Nallankulam is a small village in Nanguneri block in Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Dhalapathi Samuthram Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Valliyur
topPlaces.description: Vadakku valliyur or Valliyur is a Special Grade Town Panchayat in Radhapuram taluk in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.Valliyur is one of the fastest-growing towns in Tirunelveli district. This town is located along NH 7.

topPlaces.name: Thulukkarpatti
topPlaces.description: Thulukkarpatti is a village in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in Tirunelveli district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Snows?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Snows is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Snows?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Snows?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Snows at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Snows?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Snows start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Snows?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kallikulam, Kizhavaneri, Vadakkuvalliyur, Anaikulam, Valliyur Subramanya Swamy Temple.
